message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Worker-1: T1 JWT security impl">
You are worker-1, member of team dev-taskflow-m1m2m3m6.
Superior: Team Lead (TL).
Allowed contacts: TL only.
Do NOT SendMessage anyone else. No peer communication.

YOUR TASK:
T1: M1 - User Entity + JWT Security Foundation

Build authentication infrastructure — User entity, repository, JWT token provider, JWT authentication filter, and SecurityConfig update.

Acceptance criteria:
- User entity with id (Long auto), username (unique, 3-50, alphanumeric+underscore), password (bcrypt hash), displayName (1-100), createdAt
- UserRepository with findByUsername returning Optional<User>
- JwtTokenProvider: generateToken(userId), validateToken(token), getUserIdFromToken(token). JJWT 0.12.5 API. Secret from app.jwt.secret, expiry from app.jwt.expiration.
- JwtAuthenticationFilter: extends OncePerRequestFilter, extracts Bearer token, validates, sets SecurityContext
- SecurityConfig: register JWT filter, configure AuthenticationEntryPoint for 401 (NOT 403)
- M1-AC3: bcrypt stored, M1-AC8: no header→401, M1-AC9: expired→401, M1-AC10: malformed→401

File Scope:
- ALLOWED: backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java
- READONLY: backend/src/main/resources/application.yml, backend/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml, backend/pom.xml, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/TaskflowApplication.java
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

REQUIRED READING (do this FIRST before writing any code):
1. PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
2. CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
3. Test files: backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/entity/UserTest.java, backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepositoryTest.java, backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProviderTest.java, backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilterTest.java, backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/SecurityIntegrationTest.java
4. Implementation notes: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/temp/impl-notes-1.md
5. READONLY files listed above

YOUR JOB:
- Write code that passes ALL 41 provided tests
- Stay strictly within File Scope (5 ALLOWED files only)
- Follow project standards noted in PLAN (NO Lombok, Java 17, JJWT 0.12.5)
- Follow actual surrounding code style

PARALLEL AWARENESS:
Other Workers may be running in parallel in the same repo.
Their test files may not compile (missing dependencies from unfinished tasks).
ONLY run YOUR test files:
- cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend
- ./mvnw test -Dtest="UserTest,UserRepositoryTest,JwtTokenProviderTest,JwtAuthenticationFilterTest,SecurityIntegrationTest" -pl . 2>&1 | tail -80
Do NOT run the full test suite. Do NOT fix or remove other Workers' test files.

SCOPE ENFORCEMENT (STRICTLY ENFORCED):
- ALLOWED: edit freely (5 files listed above)
- READONLY: read for context only, CANNOT modify
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN — do not touch
- Need out-of-scope file → SendMessage TL with reason. Do NOT edit it yourself

LOG WRITING:
Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/logs/worker-1.log.md (append-only):

On start:
[LOG] task=T1 | event=start | files=User.java,UserRepository.java,JwtTokenProvider.java,JwtAuthenticationFilter.java,SecurityConfig.java

On issues:
[LOG] task=T1 | event=issue | detail={description}

Before completion:
[LOG] task=T1 | event=complete | files-changed={list} | tests-passed={all|partial}
[METRICS] model=sonnet | input=n/a | output=n/a | duration={seconds}s

COMPLETION SEQUENCE:
1. Verify all 41 tests pass
1.5. Run `git diff --name-only` → compare against ALLOWED list.
     If ANY file outside ALLOWED was modified → revert it
2. Write final log entries
3. SendMessage TL: task ID, status (done/blocked), tests passed/failed count, changed files list. No code snippets.
4. Wait for TL response, then approve shutdown when requested
</teammate-message>

1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
     6→[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
     9→[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage
    10→
    11→[SECTION] Standards
    12→[SOURCE] none
    13→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Specs
    16→[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    17→[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md

    19→[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    20→

    22→[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
    23→[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
    24→[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5

[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=M3 | name=Task State Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
    17→[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    18→[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]
    19→
    20→[SECTION] Error Format
    21→[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body
    22→
    23→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    24→[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
    25→[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
    26→[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
    27→[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    30→

[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401

[SECTION] Amendment Log

content.content:
1→# Implementation Notes for T1: User Entity + JWT Security Foundation
     2→
     3→## Files to Create/Modify
     4→
     5→1. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java`
     6→2. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java`
     7→3. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java`
     8→4. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`
     9→5. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java` (modify existing)
    10→
    11→## Framework Gotchas
    12→
    13→### User Entity
    14→- NO Lombok. Write getters/setters manually.
    15→- Use `@Entity`, `@Table(name = "users")` (avoid reserved word `user` in H2).
    16→- `@Id` + `@GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)` for auto-increment.
    17→- `@Column(unique = true)` on username to enforce uniqueness at DB level.
    18→- Username validation: `@Size(min = 3, max = 50)` + `@Pattern(regexp = "^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$")`.
    19→- DisplayName validation: `@NotBlank` + `@Size(min = 1, max = 100)`.
    20→- `createdAt` should use `@Column(updatable = false)` + `@PrePersist` callback to set `LocalDateTime.now()`.
    21→- Tests expect `getCreatedAt()` to return non-null after persistence.
    22→
    23→### UserRepository
    24→- Simple interface extending `JpaRepository<User, Long>`.
    25→- Must define `Optional<User> findByUsername(String username)`.
    26→- Spring Data derives the query automatically.
    27→
    28→### JwtTokenProvider
    29→- Tests instantiate directly with `new JwtTokenProvider()` and call `setSecret(String)` / `setExpiration(long)`.
    30→- Must provide public setter methods for `secret` and `expiration` (or use `@Value` + setters).
    31→- Use JJWT 0.12.5 API:
    32→  - Key: `Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(secret.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8))` -- secret must be >= 32 bytes.
    33→  - Generate: `Jwts.builder().subject(String.valueOf(userId)).issuedAt(now).expiration(expiryDate).signWith(key).compact()`
    34→  - Parse: `Jwts.parser().verifyWith(key).build().parseSignedClaims(token).getPayload()`
    35→  - Store userId in `subject` claim as String, parse back with `Long.parseLong()`.
    36→- `validateToken()` must catch all exceptions (ExpiredJwtException, MalformedJwtException, etc.) and return false.
    37→- `validateToken(null)` and `validateToken("")` must return false.
    38→- For expired token test: expiration=0L means token expires at issuedAt time. Make sure this works.
    39→
    40→### JwtAuthenticationFilter
    41→- Extends `OncePerRequestFilter`.
    42→- Tests inject `JwtTokenProvider` via constructor: `new JwtAuthenticationFilter(jwtTokenProvider)`.
    43→- Must have constructor that takes `JwtTokenProvider`.
    44→- `doFilterInternal()` is tested directly (it's protected in OncePerRequestFilter, tests call it because they're in same package or subclass).
    45→- Extract token: check `Authorization` header starts with `"Bearer "`, strip prefix.
    46→- If no header or not Bearer prefix -> skip, just call filterChain.doFilter().
    47→- If token valid -> set `UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken` with principal = userId (Long).
    48→- If token invalid or exception -> do NOT set auth, just continue filter chain.
    49→- Always call `filterChain.doFilter()` regardless of token validity.
    50→
    51→### SecurityConfig Modifications
    52→- Add `JwtAuthenticationFilter` bean or inject it.
    53→- Register with `.addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class)`.
    54→- The existing config already has correct URL patterns and STATELESS sessions.
    55→- Must handle 401 for unauthenticated requests: add `.exceptionHandling(ex -> ex.authenticationEntryPoint(...))` that returns 401 JSON.
    56→- Without an explicit AuthenticationEntryPoint, Spring Security may return 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests.
    57→
    58→### Key Integration Test Expectations
    59→- `GET /api/tasks` without token -> 401 (not 403).
    60→- `GET /api/tasks` with expired/malformed token -> 401.
    61→- `GET /api/tasks` with valid token -> NOT 401/403 (may be 404 if TaskController doesn't exist yet).
    62→- `GET /api/auth/me` -> NOT 403 (auth endpoints are public via SecurityConfig).
    63→
    64→## Mock Strategies
    65→- JwtAuthenticationFilterTest: Mock `JwtTokenProvider`, use `MockHttpServletRequest/Response`.
    66→- UserRepositoryTest: `@DataJpaTest` with `TestEntityManager` for persistence.
    67→- JwtTokenProviderTest: Pure unit test, no Spring context, direct instantiation.
    68→- SecurityIntegrationTest: `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc` for full context.
    69→
    70→## Common Pitfall
    71→- Spring Security 6.x returns 403 by default for unauthenticated requests (no AuthenticationEntryPoint configured). You MUST configure an `AuthenticationEntryPoint` that returns 401 to pass the integration tests.
    72→

file.content:
# Implementation Notes for T1: User Entity + JWT Security Foundation

## Files to Create/Modify

1. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java`
2. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java`
3. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java`
4. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`
5. `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java` (modify existing)

## Framework Gotchas

### User Entity
- NO Lombok. Write getters/setters manually.
- Use `@Entity`, `@Table(name = "users")` (avoid reserved word `user` in H2).
- `@Id` + `@GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)` for auto-increment.
- `@Column(unique = true)` on username to enforce uniqueness at DB level.
- Username validation: `@Size(min = 3, max = 50)` + `@Pattern(regexp = "^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$")`.
- DisplayName validation: `@NotBlank` + `@Size(min = 1, max = 100)`.
- `createdAt` should use `@Column(updatable = false)` + `@PrePersist` callback to set `LocalDateTime.now()`.
- Tests expect `getCreatedAt()` to return non-null after persistence.

### UserRepository
- Simple interface extending `JpaRepository<User, Long>`.
- Must define `Optional<User> findByUsername(String username)`.
- Spring Data derives the query automatically.

### JwtTokenProvider
- Tests instantiate directly with `new JwtTokenProvider()` and call `setSecret(String)` / `setExpiration(long)`.
- Must provide public setter methods for `secret` and `expiration` (or use `@Value` + setters).
- Use JJWT 0.12.5 API:
  - Key: `Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(secret.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8))` -- secret must be >= 32 bytes.
  - Generate: `Jwts.builder().subject(String.valueOf(userId)).issuedAt(now).expiration(expiryDate).signWith(key).compact()`
  - Parse: `Jwts.parser().verifyWith(key).build().parseSignedClaims(token).getPayload()`
  - Store userId in `subject` claim as String, parse back with `Long.parseLong()`.
- `validateToken()` must catch all exceptions (ExpiredJwtException, MalformedJwtException, etc.) and return false.
- `validateToken(null)` and `validateToken("")` must return false.
- For expired token test: expiration=0L means token expires at issuedAt time. Make sure this works.

### JwtAuthenticationFilter
- Extends `OncePerRequestFilter`.
- Tests inject `JwtTokenProvider` via constructor: `new JwtAuthenticationFilter(jwtTokenProvider)`.
- Must have constructor that takes `JwtTokenProvider`.
- `doFilterInternal()` is tested directly (it's protected in OncePerRequestFilter, tests call it because they're in same package or subclass).
- Extract token: check `Authorization` header starts with `"Bearer "`, strip prefix.
- If no header or not Bearer prefix -> skip, just call filterChain.doFilter().
- If token valid -> set `UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken` with principal = userId (Long).
- If token invalid or exception -> do NOT set auth, just continue filter chain.
- Always call `filterChain.doFilter()` regardless of token validity.

### SecurityConfig Modifications
- Add `JwtAuthenticationFilter` bean or inject it.
- Register with `.addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class)`.
- The existing config already has correct URL patterns and STATELESS sessions.
- Must handle 401 for unauthenticated requests: add `.exceptionHandling(ex -> ex.authenticationEntryPoint(...))` that returns 401 JSON.
- Without an explicit AuthenticationEntryPoint, Spring Security may return 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests.

### Key Integration Test Expectations
- `GET /api/tasks` without token -> 401 (not 403).
- `GET /api/tasks` with expired/malformed token -> 401.
- `GET /api/tasks` with valid token -> NOT 401/403 (may be 404 if TaskController doesn't exist yet).
- `GET /api/auth/me` -> NOT 403 (auth endpoints are public via SecurityConfig).

## Mock Strategies
- JwtAuthenticationFilterTest: Mock `JwtTokenProvider`, use `MockHttpServletRequest/Response`.
- UserRepositoryTest: `@DataJpaTest` with `TestEntityManager` for persistence.
- JwtTokenProviderTest: Pure unit test, no Spring context, direct instantiation.
- SecurityIntegrationTest: `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc` for full context.

## Common Pitfall
- Spring Security 6.x returns 403 by default for unauthenticated requests (no AuthenticationEntryPoint configured). You MUST configure an `AuthenticationEntryPoint` that returns 401 to pass the integration tests.

file.content:
spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:taskflow
    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
    username: sa
    password:
  h2:
    console:
      enabled: true
      path: /h2-console
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: create-drop
    show-sql: true
    properties:
      hibernate:
        format_sql: true

content.content:

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.3</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <groupId>com.taskflow</groupId>
    <artifactId>taskflow-backend</artifactId>
    <version>0.1.0</version>
    <name>taskflow-backend</name>
    <description>TaskFlow Backend - Spring Boot 3 + H2</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Starters -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- JWT -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Testing -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>
